S.FORM: I 1957 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Central african republic anini i ci Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 30 a romi'ad.
S.PHON: i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ maso~ufo~u ¶ ¶i fao~u~ustin-ar ¶ńßaŇč…ô to~uo~u~ua…¨~…ģ*ra , ma…ĺamiko~umo~u…¨~…ģaj a tam…¨~…ģaw. o~u sawara °an no~u kitakit no~u ¶…ôntra…ĺ afri ¶an r…ôpo~u~ub~b~v…ĺi ¶ anini i ¶i fao~u~ustin-ar ¶ńßaŇč…ô to~uo~u~ua…¨~…ģ*ra, patir…ôŇčan a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ i **** a mińß…ô ¶a saka * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ saka ** a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ.
S.FORM: I 1957 a miheca saka 4 folad saka 21 a romi'ad masofoc ci Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra , malamikomoday a tamdaw. O Sawara'an no kitakit no Central african republic anini i ci Faustin-Archange Touad√©ra, patirengan a romi'ad i 2016 a miheca saka 3 folad saka 30 a romi'ad.
